reviews.review_description:
I can't give it five stars 'cause the animations are way off, but I am giving it four. Other reviews say it's jittery, bad, and boring. I had no performance issues, had fun, and good god I loved the gameplay. The voice acting was great, and I literally immediately want to replay it.

However. After you deal with Brooke, there is an issue. I reloaded my checkpoint (because I accidentally did the opposite choice I wanted to do), and was put at the start, where I had to go back to the room, and got blocked. There's a barrier at the vent (presumably so I don't go back up mid-cutscene), but it stays after I reload. And get sent back to the beginning. Where my checkpoint is. It's possible I did it too quick, and then never hit the checkpoint, but I thought I'd point it out just in case. Anyway, it IS a good game.

First of all let's talk about graphics. The graphics are pretty decent actually for Standalone Hardware. Could they be better? Of course they could but they're perfectly serviceable for the type of game it is. Is the gameplay good? Yes the gameplay is pretty good as well. I do think the telekinetic attack needs to be changed from that annoying little meter to an actual action that allows you to pop their heads that's probably the most glaring telekinetic issue I hate right now. I think the complaint from most people in this game though is going to be from the abysmal frame rate. I'm not even sure it's the actual frame rate because it doesn't get exacerbated with faster movement. I think it's just some kind of artifact from asynchronous space warp. In any event it's got to get fixed which people have already mentioned this so I won't beat the dead horse. I really enjoy the teleporting this game although we've seen this before the way you initiate it with a button push and a whip pull is pretty cool. So with a few well-placed patches I would give this game a solid four star rating.  update :Game has received an update that improves graphics and performance with a performance mode. The game just feels better now and looks better, for that reason I'm now raising my rating to four stars.

reviews.review_title: This Game is great. Just a few bugs
reviews.review_description: I bought this game after re-watching The Boys seasons 1-4 and all I have to say is, it is amazing. Felt like the Armstrong Family was a great choice for villains. Perfectly executed how Vought deals with a crisis, making everyone at fault other than the Supes. All of the powers you get in this game, while a little buggy, are amazing. Wanna shoot lasers out of your eyes or have claws that pop out of your hands? This is the game for you. All I really wanted to say though was that during my playthrough, I felt like it was a little short and could have had more content (Sidequests, more lore, etc). There were a few bugs here and there, the one I got the most was when after dying, you get sent to the settings screen where it took me mashing the settings button just to close it and keep playing. Other than that, this game was perfect. I urge you to buy this game if you are a fan of The Boys.

I just got this game and beat it. It was amazing 👏  I'll you care about the storyline and not the graphics it's worth it, it really needs a refined sequel, when i got the laser eyes i loved em, only bad thing about the game is you don't get to kill all the Armstrong, or homelander, W game, would play again, 10/10

Originally I gave this game a 5 star review because I really liked the gameplay. But after the patch ALL of my saved games are lost!!! WTF??? Is this what you call a good update??? I am not willing to play through the whole game once more and it is a shame that an "update" deletes all your saved files. I cannot describe how disappointed I am! This is how you turn fans of the game into disappointed "one star reviewers"! Super unprofessional and self destructive on the part of the developers. BRAVO!!! EDIT: Thanx to the devs! My saved games have reappeared. That was a pretty fast response and I am giving the game its five stars back. Really looking forward to playing now. ;o))

Great game. Great concept, good artwork, pretty good gameplay except for an occasional player like myself. Have beaten other difficult games . It's just too hard to get past the first superhero would love an update with an easy mode for casual players like me.

Feels like you’re living inside an episode of the series. The action is chaotic, violent in the right measure, and really captures The Boys’ vibe. The powers are a lot of fun to use and open up multiple combat approaches, overall a great experience packed with great moments.

I lasted around 2 minutes in this game. Standing in the menu, leaning and can instantly see the blurry wobble (im guessing spacewarp) which instantly looks horrendous.

Loaded into the first mission, walked 4 steps forward and my god is the frame rate 15fps.

Absolutely horrendous and if ANYONE suffers from VR sickness, do not buy this.

If this game was tested and someone said "yep thats good, send it out" then they need firing.

It will be refunded in the next 10 minutes.

developer_response.body:
We’re very sorry to hear about your experience. We know some players are experiencing performance issues, and our team is actively working on optimizations. We truly appreciate you taking the time to share this feedback. We're working on a patch and will release it soon.

EDIT: Since your feedback, we’ve released two major updates that significantly improved both the game’s performance and visuals. We’d really recommend giving the game another try if you haven’t checked it out recently, as the experience is now much smoother overall. Hope to hear back from you!

reviews.review_title: I lost my save game today.
reviews.review_description: I've been playing the game on and off now since release and I had made it to the last level of the game. I remember last night seeing that I had spent around 6 and half hours in the main menu. Overall up to that point, I'd had a great time with the game and I know, it's rough at times but I enjoyed it regardless. Then today, there was a patch released. When I started the game, I was shocked when I saw the comfort options pop up but I went along with it. Then the next thing I know, it's the opening sequence. I immediately paused the game and went to the main menu. Right there in slot 1 was a new game save. All my progress was gone. The only reason I'm giving this game 5 stars is because I love Arvore games, I also had a great time overall with the game, and I know they'll fix this issue. I've played all of their games and they've always made top quality games. That was painful though guys.

developer_response.body:
Hi punkemoska, thank you so much for your kind words and support — it really means a lot to the team. We’re truly sorry this happened to you, especially after all the progress you had made.
We’ve identified the issue introduced in the recent patch and have just released a hotfix to address it. After updating, if multiple save files are detected, the game will prompt you to select the correct one.
If you continue to experience any issues, please don’t hesitate to reach out — we’ll be happy to help! You can also contact us directly through our Discord channel for faster support.
Thanks again for your patience and support! We really appreciate it!.

reviews.review_description: Game's great, amazing modelling, anyone who's a fan of Saints and Sinners would love this game, it's got a very similar feel to it, except it's linear. The bosses are amazing the game is appropriately brutal and gross just like the show, and the main cast returns for the most part. There's only one problem, and it's a big one: This game's description claims there are "impossible decisions" to make, which sounds a lot like saying there's multiple endings, or at least multiple outcomes of certain scenarios, but there aren't... You don't make any decisions, you just follow a single linear path, which hugely affects replayability, like I wanted to see what would have happened if we went through with Pheromom's plan, or if we decided to play through the game without Temp V at all, I just wish it was explained better and for a $30 game, from this franchise I was expecting to see what I was promised
The game is great love the story puts you right in the series couldn't help but laugh at the Oldman in the wheelchair 😂 definitely wanna see this game progress

Animations were strange and Bucher did a head bob every other sentence but the parts with homelander like the 1st time you see him and the music starts playing had me fearing for my life amd the ending was great I wish the game was longer though it took me 2-3 days playing like 1.5 hourse each time :/

i think this is a good game but why did it end like that like that's just sad
like he could of ran but he didn't like who made this ending its too sad

I felt thrown straight into an episode of the series, with that constant feeling of being in the wrong place at the wrong time. The violence is impactful, but not gratuitous, it is part of the world and makes everything more real. The powers with Temp V are a highlight: you can play in a more stealth way, or sometimes just go after everyone. The art direction of the game is incredible, everything makes sense and in a few minutes, I already felt inside the universe. For those who enjoy VR games with a good experience, The Boys will be a mandatory game for you. I loved it!

Love the game but y’all need to add a homelander DLC cause it’s a boys vr game and we need more of homelanders classic song and if y’all can make it 2+ hours and add grabbing people/punching in the dlc if you can add more people in levels and if you can get homelander and add that one scene from the game about homelander pushing the guy off the vaught building and give us his perspective please and thanks

To get things straight, I dont mind the story. Its pretty good compared to the show. But I have some issues with it.

The thing that makes me mad the most is how the characters move. And how it transitions. The character movement is nonexistent and they just stand there until you go on the next mission. Atleast make them do something instead of staring into space.


Like said, transitions are not even real. It would suddenly just cut to a new area. Thats not how you do game design.
This game was amazing after keeping up with the show this didn’t disappoint maybe more boss fights but that’s about it

reviews.review_title: THE BOYS ARE BACK IN TOWN
reviews.review_description:
A big fat hell yeah from me.
Don’t worry about the negative ninny’s , this is a very clever game, it’s not Red matter 2 graphics but they do look very good. It’s standalone, so deal with it and just enjoy the game. The powers you have are pretty good and accurate, it makes such a change not to have to punch an opponent but use your powers if you don’t want to use stealth, which I don’t, I want to take them all out.
Having a blast so far, if you get motion sickness maybe play in small parts.
Really enjoying so far.

I mean the voices of all of the characters was just flawless, Yeah i mean some were a bit off but overall the story line was good. A lot of sneaking around and some bugs but overall this has some potential.

reviews.review_title: Confused on the first boss fight
reviews.review_description: So I just got the game and got my first boss down to half im not really sure what im supposed to do to him when he's on that ice tower I can see i should attack when he's recharging but I don't know how im supposed to reach him anyone know how?

developer_response.body:
Sorry to hear you’re having trouble... But we're happy to help!
In the second phase of the fight, pay close attention to the pillars. There are two of them: one that’s out of reach, and another with a platform you can use.
Use your TK Pull to reach the platform, and from there, use it again to position yourself in front of Parkool. That’s your window to attack.
Hope that helps! Let us know if you’re still stuck!

reviews.review_description: You’re gonna beat it in like 4 hours and the animation is pretty bad, but the powers are super fun and the different temp v types are fun to use. The story is pretty good and I like how they used the actors from the show for the voices.

The narrative closely resembles what’d you’d expect and thankfully the extreme violence and coarse language is not watered down. It basically feels like you’re in the show. Graphics are a bit average though. So cool to grab things from afar and throw, teleport, x-ray, purple crystal hands to slice and block bullets. The overall game environment however, just leaves a feeling of rushed.   Hardly any interaction, and the levels look almost identical. Gets really repetitive with the whole repeat of the main briefing, the side briefing, and basically same mission objectives. Not to mention the NPCs look the same. I can only recommend if you’re a die hard the boys fan. If wasn’t, this as a general game is pretty bland and basic.

developer_response.body:
Hey there
This impression you had that the game feels repetitive at times was due to design choices intended to complement the story we were telling. It's really a shame it didn't do it for you.
We worked alongside the TV series writer’s room to keep the overall tone of the game the same as the show. We're glad to know you liked this part!

reviews.review_description: Don't even bother. This game is a piece of crap. The devs should be embarrassed for ever having released this garbage. The powers are terrible, and don't even work half the time, especially when you need them most. It's quite honestly one of the worst games I have ever played. I'm a huge 'The Boys' fan. I'm very disappointed.

developer_response.body: We’re sorry the game didn’t meet your expectations, especially ‘cause you are a big fan of the franchise. Assuming that your review is mainly due to the performance issues, we don’t know if you saw it already, but some days ago we released a new update aimed especially at graphic polishment as well as performance adjustments, so if you haven’t updated your game yet, we strongly recommend you do so, and maybe give the game another go. Hope to hear back from you.

reviews.review_description: the game is amazing loved the story but anychance there is another the boys game in the works or maybe an  dlc for killing more supes like maybe trancelucent

I had a lot of fun playing this the story was good really felt like i was in an episode of the boys. The levels were a little repetitive but made since for the story. The temp v stuff was really fun and satisfying to use. It is a shame we only got to see one supe from the seven. The stealth parts were annoying at times but also fun. I'm sure a lot of people will complain about the graphics I'm sure it will get wat better over time and if you own a psvr2 you should definitely get it on there. All things considered after some patches and updates this could be up there with deadpool vr and batman : arkham shadow

the inter missions ￼are a little to long and I would wait for it to go on sail but overall it’s a great game
￼

The game looks great! I played on Quest 3S. Didn't have any problems with bugs. It was super smooth. I wasn't sure I was gonna like the game, but I enjoyed it. I liked the super powers. The characters were funny. Alot of it was going back to the same area, and that was a bit repetitive, but overall I enjoyed it. It was worth the price and time. I think people overthink stuff. They're upset when a game isn't what they've been expecting it to be and they leave a bad review. If a game is playable, thats 3 stars right there. If it looks good and has a decent storyline, there's your other 2.

I’m giving it 2.5 out of five. You can’t move in this game.  It’s like 30 FPS.  It’s gonna make people very sick. Plus, the cut scene acting is completely an animatronic.  It looks like this game is all about it It’s cut scenes. I’m still gonna finish it, but I’m very disappointed.  Why every time a good IP comes to VR The developers are weak as hell. Maybe they ran out of money. Bummer, love the show.

developer_response.body:
Hi there. First of all, thanks for taking the time to share your feedback. Framewise, we tested the game to make sure people would have a comfortable experience and avoid getting any kind of motion sickness. That said, we are aware of some people facing FPS drops during gameplay and we are already working on patching it asap.

EDIT: Since your feedback, we’ve released two major updates that significantly improved both the game’s performance and visuals. We’d really recommend giving the game another try if you haven’t checked it out recently, as the experience is now much smoother overall. Hope to hear back from you!

reviews.review_description: Buggy af, kinda fun to start with, but gets frustrating early on. First boss fight, you're supposed to use your power to throw ice back at the guy but most the time it doesn't work. I must've kept trying 12x before saying f **k it & quitting the game. Lesson learned, though I'll never pre-order another game again. I only wasted $20 & I'm upset about it, definitely don't pay $30, atleast not until they fix this sh!t **Edit** I requested a refund but because I preordered it over 14 day ago, I can’t get one..

developer_response.body:
Sorry to hear about your disappointment in our game. We worked hard to make it a fun experience for everyone. That said, we are aware of the bugs some people are facing and we are very sorry about them. We are working on them as we speak to have them patched quickly. Thanks for your patience.

EDIT: Since your feedback, we’ve released two major updates that significantly improved both the game’s performance and visuals. We’d really recommend giving the game another try if you haven’t checked it out recently, as the experience is now much smoother overall. Hope to hear back from you!

reviews.review_description: I barely got past the 2nd mission before I lost all interest, stealth is super weird with enemy takedowns being tied too quick time events but even if you do it perfectly enemies may still hear you. Your character is the typical "says everything out like and quips like he's the second coming of Leon Kennedy" combat is barely any better with it's introduction amounting to you killing 4 guys, watching the boss spawn into place and then circling him, waving your hands wildly until you get pushed away and then repeat on the topic of powers your telekinesis A: feels really clunky as when throwing stuff it's liable to go in the complete opposite direction of where you were pointing B: feels like w cheap way for the devs too not have too animate the player grabbing anything. For positives the voice actors coming from the show bring their A-Game, they could've easily just given this minimal effort but from what I played it was easily the highlight. Some people say the graphics are good but honestly half my library has better graphics then this. If you want a "so bad its good" I guess maybe you might like it but otherwise don't even bother, go play Bonelab or Blade and sorcery

It’s pretty good despite some bugs and performance issues, but it should’ve been WAY longer. For a $30 game published by a huge studio you’d think it would’ve blown ur socks off. I even took my time playing on the hardest difficulty and looking for all the evidence and it still only took me a few hours to beat. I didn’t really enjoy the ending, felt like it was cut short. Would’ve been cool to have had some sort of fight with Homelander even if the outcome was the same. All that aside I did enjoy the stealth aspects and the superpowers. Some of the mechanics are cool even though they’re janky. Overall not bad, just feel like there’s way more potential.

reviews.review_title: Big title doesn't equal triple A game
reviews.review_description:
What you see in the trailer, regarding environment is probably the only graphically fleshed out area. That area is also very very small. This goes is about 3 hours long, if that as well. The combat is lacking and is not physics based at all. The story is mediocre and interactions with characters you'd expect or want to see from "The Boys" is lacking significantly. It kinda feels like bought came to life, made a really low grade (cut all corners) game and is trying to sell it. 

DO YOURSELVES A FAVOR, SAVE YOUR MONEY AND SKIP THIS ONE. YOUVE BEEN PREWARNED.

developer_response.body:
Hi there, thanks for sharing your opinion about our game, even though we don’t quite agree with how you saw the aspects of the game story-wise. You see, the game was written alongside the TV series writers' room in order to keep it in the same tone as the show itself. We understand some of the development decisions regarding combat and graphic style choice didn’t meet your expectations.
In any case, thanks again for sharing your thoughts.

reviews.review_description:
It really does fit The Boys well as far as story goes and it’s fun gameplay I like stealth and action games so in that aspect it’s a 4.

However the game does have low frame rates which for me are easy to ignore, but can get annoying after awhile, which is where the 3.5 comes in for me. 

Still great story so far it’s basically like you’re in an actual episode of the boys I’d give it a 5 once it comes with a patch fixing the frames.

I'm really enjoying the game, especially as a fan  of the show.  The "sup" ability are intuitive and fun to use. And Im definitely liking the story so far. I would say my only real issue is that if sneak up on a guard and he turns around you cant do anything. You can grab him, you cant punch him, you Might be able to throw something at him (but you need to throw Two things at him to knock him out). So most of the time you just stand there and eat bullets since you cant do anything to him.  Would be nice to be able to punch them, even just to stun them, because currently there is not much you can do when you're face to face with a guard.

The Boys: Trigger Warning is challenging and fun - a stealth action game worth playing. Massive shout to the devs for including Quest Achievements to hunt and track via the Horizon Mobile App and Achievement Hunting Discord - securing it's spot as an experience that we will play fully in order to fully complete the list. It's everything we hoped for 🤘

First off. I have not completely finished the game yet. Currently I believe in on Ch. 6. I'm enjoying the game a great deal thus far. The story is good and your mission is clear on what must be done. The graphics are kinda in between. Not the best but also not the worse. I feel perhaps an update could improve things a bit in that department. Also, there are instances where things are a little jankey. Frame rate, doors not opening right away and floating hands..  These are all issues I feel could be fixed with the proper update. 

Where this game really shines is with your powers. It really feels great using your abilities to destroy guards and boss fights. The laser eyes feel awesome when taking out foes. Stealth attack ability is also impressive. Sneaking behind someone and basically ripping them apart without even touching them is great. The movement system also feels really good. Being able to teleport quickly through vents and other areas work really well. 

This game is a fun game that should definitely be added to your library. With the right update it could even get better.
Love this game so far it’s so fun

reviews.review_title: Great game, but performance is off
reviews.review_description: The game itself, even only 1 hour in, is great. Seems like it could legitimately be an episode of the boys, and good story so far. Gameplay is fun as well, but the frame rate is the ONLY thing stopping me from continuing. I gave it 5 stars instead of 4 cause i know arvore will eventually fix it. Id rather wait til they release an update to hopefully make it more smooth, then complete the game. Also, i have faith in arvore, especially after the pixel ripped games, so im sure they will come through. Also, devs, i pray you guys will one day release it on PC, so i can experience it at its full potential 😭😭😭 i hope you guys are at least thinking about it. I will buy it twice just to get it on there as well

I love The Boys and being inside this universe was so much fun!! I´m very impressed by the narrative of this game is so good. Having superpowers in VR hits different I want more!! I got scared so many times the intensity is on another level, even simple encounters turn into adrenaline-filled moments. It’s not just about combat, it’s about presence. You feel the tension, the pressure, and the satisfaction when you make it through.

reviews.review_title: A Lot to Offer, but Poor Performance
reviews.review_description: There is a lot to offer here, and I am enjoying the voice acting and gameplay. However, the performance is really bad on a Quest 3. The whole thing stutters and feels like its running at 10 frames-per-second. I play a lot of VR and am not prone to sickness at all, but this stuttery mess makes me pretty uncomfortable. I'm getting tired of buying games, and then having to wait for a patch to actually enjoy it. It's not like I'm trying to play PCVR with a weak machine. This is Quest 3. Was this tested at all? Delay would have been better than releasing it in this state. Guess I'll play something else and wait for a patch. I hate leaving negative reviews given the challenges of the VR market, but I would recommend waiting on this one until they patch it.

developer_response.body: Hi there, thanks for your feedback. We are aware of the issues some people are facing, and we are already working on getting it all patched asap.

reviews.review_description: Very good story and pretty fun gameplay. I hate that it kept pausing on me because I moved around my play space too much. I don't use the joystick to turn cause it makes me very sick so making it a must is dumb. Dead pool has the same problem. Stop making people use the joystick to turn and open up how much they can move so the game doesn't pause repeatedly because I turned around physically or took a step in any direction

developer_response.body:
Hi there!
First of all, glad to know you had fun with our game. This is our main goal always!
About what you pointed out regarding snapturning, we can study a way to make it adjustable in a future patch. Thanks again for your input on that.
Cheers

reviews.review_description: I haven't seen the series but this game is a treat for stealth lovers. I enjoyed it a lot. Many bugs have been sorted out. Its a must have title for stealth genre lovers.

[Spoiler Warning]

The Boys Trigger Waring is a game that I would only recommend getting if you like short experiences, Because HOLY COW this game is short as hell!

The V powers are fun even tho there’s not a lot to choose from, The levels are….okay-ish??? There just VERY forgettable.

The main character Lucas Costa is the average dad character who tries to save her daughter from the Armstrongs, But Jess is the most insufferable character in the entire game, how does she not understand that if the Armstrongs are still alive that they will come after them ESPECIALLY IN THE LATE GAME WHEN SHE SMASHES V AND PUTS HER DAD IN EVEN MORE DANGER BECAUSE LEVITATE (The Leader) NOW KNOWS WHO HE IS!￼

But at least when Lucas sacrifices himself so she could get away was very brave and kind of him to do and when he started talking smack about Homelander in his face was VERY brave

And when you beat the game, you’ll be shocked to find out there’s NOTHING TO DO!

In summary: The Boys trigger warning is a 5/10 game with some fun gameplay at times but with a linear story, some bad characters and the game being WAY too short

developer_response.body: Even with the feeling that it’s too short, we’re glad to see you had fun playing the game! The amount of details you had on your review shows you were really invested, that alone makes our day already.

reviews.review_description: I hate how I can't just like up punch an enemy and how some parts of the game I had to look up to get through and also when you kill an enemy if you get on top of him and then use your ability you fly they just need to make the game nore straight forward on what to do and maby add like hints with arrows on what to do

developer_response.body:
Hi there
Sorry to hear that the design choices didn’t do it for you. Thanks for taking the time to send us your feedback.

reviews.review_description:
Abysmal movement. Potentially nausea-inducing frame rates. 

The way my character moved, it felt like he was very drunk. Died often due to delayed  reaction to controller inputs, and overall clumsy movement. I regularly  struggled to move in and out of the vents, often getting hung up on boxes, walls, and invisible obstacles.

OVR Metrics Tool showed consistent framerates in low- to mid-30's, and I don't think I saw a framerate over 37. 

Hopefully these issues can be addressed in upcoming patches. But as I write this review, the game feels not just unpolished, but also unfinished. In it's current state, I feel this game should have been released as a demo, or as an Early Access title in the  $5.99 to $9.99 (at most) range.

developer_response.body:
Hi there, thanks for your feedback. Framewise, we tested the game to make sure people would have a comfortable experience and avoid getting any kind of motion sickness. That said, we are aware of some people still facing some issues with it and we are already working on patching it asap.

EDIT: Since your feedback, we’ve released two major updates that significantly improved both the game’s performance and visuals. We’d really recommend giving the game another try if you haven’t checked it out recently, as the experience is now much smoother overall. Hope to hear back from you!

reviews.review_description:
Horrible framerate and stuttering on my quest 3. The game needs an immediate patch. It'll be a great game once the mechanics are patched up but im not playing it any further until this is done. Giving it a 3 and hope to be able to change to 5 after it gets the update it drastically needs. Devs were probably under pressure to release it a bit too early.

Edit 7th April: Devs when will the patch be released and why didnt you wait until you'd finish the game fully before release because you knew it wasn't ready hence you working on a patch on the day of release?

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear you are getting issues playing our game and that they impacted your overall experience. We are aware of some people facing FPS drops during gameplay and we are already working on patching it asap. Thanks for your patience

reviews.review_title: Great fun, QGO will refine visuals later
reviews.review_description: The game is intuitive and good fun. There are a few small graphical glitches but didnt get in the way of the gameplay and these will be ironed out im sure in upcoming patches. Quest Games Optimizer will undoubtedly take this to the next level so im looking forward to that.

As much as a let down as ep3 s5...tsk 

Was hyped but sadly let down. Has a weird hybrid sitting/standing mechanic thats mostly suited for sitting. (Weird for a hero type game with vent crawling and fast action)

(Edit for reply) i get that but im not trying to be an "a**" but chairs are moveable and its not a new thing to vr players to have a chair on standby in/or near the play space for sitting in cut scenes and for games that have vehicles in them. 

I feel this was made by people who aren't vr players at all and are just fans of VR. Its very strange that VR has been a thing for a while now and somehow this became a "good" idea at whatever table it was discused at.

developer_response.body:
Hi there, we're sad to hear that your hype didn't live up to your expectations. The “hybrid sitting/standing mechanic” you mentioned was a game design choice to go with the story we were telling; it’s part of the whole narrative, where you have these decompression moments with Butcher and MM to plan the next ‘crawling and fast action’ actions. We get it didn’t work with everybody, but it’s a shame it didn’t do it for you, ‘cause if you are a fan of the TV, we think you’d enjoy the story we were telling.

Hope you can give it another chance any day.

reviews.review_description:
I’ve been using a Quest 2 since the pandemic, and later the Quest 3, and have had so much fun. 

Also a huge fan of the developer Arvore. 

Yuki was a game changer for me. Absolutely loved it. Pixel Ripped ‘95….awesome (I haven’t played the others). 

Point is, Arvore knows how to make great games. 

Not sure what’s happened here. I see potential, although the graphics are still Pixel Ripped style. They were good for a few years ago, but graphics have progressed a lot since then. 

Other than the graphics, the performance of the game just plain sucks. What is that frame rate all about? This game doesn’t look like it uses a lot of resources, and yet we have this stuttering mess. 

I really hope Arvore can fix this with a patch or 3

developer_response.body:
Hi there! First of all, thanks for all the praise on our other games. We’re really happy they had such a positive impact on you in your gaming life. Now, about this game specifically, we’re really sorry to hear the overall experience is not as pleasant. Rest assured, we are already working on patching the game asap to bring the best experience we can to players.

EDIT: Since your feedback, we’ve released two major updates that significantly improved both the game’s performance and visuals. We’d really recommend giving the game another try if you haven’t checked it out recently, as the experience is now much smoother overall. Hope to hear back from you!

reviews.review_description: The characters look a lil goofy and the gameplay is a bit repetitive but other than that it's a really fun stealth action game

The actual gameplay is quite short. Despite this being a promotional thing for season 5  the quality and actual gameplay is brilliant it features cool mechanics and a good storyline definitely recommend for fans of the show

I love the boys show so had to get the game, but i am afraid it could have been a lot lot better, despite the jittery effect when walking or running which I'm sure will get fixed I did not have any other issues or bugs really, it was playable

Once I completed it, yeah the story pretty good, but is quite a simple repetitive game, but fun I'll say, but once again another vr game super short, had it done in 5 hours which is really lame to me, doesn't matter what or type or game it is, the shorter it is then it should be cheaper really, this is probably worth £10 at the most with the length and how its just made pretty basic and went along the lines of cartoon graphics like deadpool 

Other than that compared to other games i go back too more regular, this is one which probably bring me back after about a year just to have a bit fun and pass a few hours with it being so short, yeah there was quite a bit put into it in certain different ways but still very basic

I mean come on the boys show is huge and you've got great but not as good as the boys gen v and now there'll be vought rising prequel, the game is a bit of a let down and disappointment to the show, maybe it was the budget and they did what they could with what they had, but if and its a big if they're be a part 2 or something, it would need to be 10x better than the 1st, but after this 1st one I'll not be counting my chickens there'll be a 2nd

It's a real shame tbh as it could have been much better and actually worth the money if it was a lot longer, more stuff to do, more powers to use and they lasted a bit longer than 10 seconds if that, but it seems to have been rushed

Not the worst short vr game but far from one of the best, hence why it only gets 3 stars from me I'm afraid, nice try though devs, and if be some miracle there maybe another the boys vr game in the future, please do better

developer_response.body:
Hi Foster, thanks for taking the time to speak your mind about our game.
We’re glad you enjoyed parts of the story and had fun overall, even though you felt it was kinda short. Regarding the issues you mentioned, we don’t know if you saw it, but we released an update some weeks ago that patched many bugs and performance issues. Maybe it's worth giving the game another go? 
Cheers.

reviews.review_title: Why make a game that the Q3 can’t handle
reviews.review_description: I can’t really understand why this game runs so poorly. I have a Meta Quest 3. This game is a Meta Quest game. It runs at barely any fps, it’s a jittery mess. How does that make any sense? Presumably someone tested this before release, said, oh well it runs absolutely dreadful, let’s release it. No thanks.

developer_response.body:
We are sorry you had a bad experience playing our game, and truly appreciate you taking the time to share your feedback.
We are aware of the issues that some people are facing and we are already working on patching it asap.

reviews.review_description: As a fan of The Boys, I was hyped for a new game to come out. Supposedly there's plenty of gameplay (Around 7 hours), and I beat the game in less than 4. Every mission is the same: wake up, talk to MM and Butcher, do the same stealth mission, come back, talk to your daughter who hardly has any plot development and then sleep. Only part I liked was the ending scene (Not the boss fight, that felt sloppy), but when I finished the game: no bonus content, no New Game+, nothing. The powers were somewhat interesting, but the graphics are built like TWD Saints and Sinners with worse quality. If youre not a massive fan of The Boys then I dont reccomend buying the game at all.

developer_response.body:
Hi there
We're sad to hear that your hype didn't live up to your expectations. The points you mentioned were all game design choices; they are all part of the whole narrative we envisioned, where, between each action segment, you have these “calm” moments to plan alongside Butcher, MM, and the rest of The Boys. It’s really a shame it didn’t do it for you.
Regarding visuals, just in case you didn’t see it, we had a patch some weeks ago that polished a lot of stuff in the game graphic-wise, maybe try to give it another go any day.

reviews.review_title: Feels like a brand new spinoff
reviews.review_description: Amazing game if you enjoy a good old single player story based experience. The narrative is so solid it feels like you’re living a brand new The Boys spinoff, with interesting believable characters and new detestable supes.

Definitely a true homage to The Boys IP. Loved to be part of the universe and in VR, it is great. Gameplay is challenging and fun, acid jokes, everything you can expect from a The Boys game. The devs nailed it.

It was a good idea, but my first shocker was the fact that you generally play the game sitting… cool it should be chill. A lot of the times the screen will go black and the pause menu open on its own and will keep you from going back to the game or even seeing the menu. I experienced this about five times during my first hour I did the game just came out today but that’s just something that could be fixed easily. A lot lot of town and go to pull something or teleport It just doesn’t register at all. And it’s frustrating because there are enemies and you just die over and over. Another issue I had is a lack of direction in the Parkool mission where he is souped up and you’re just sitting there running￼ around from his icicles falling from the sky, there is nothing telling you what to do just butchyour ear saying do something if you’re looking about this game, I said give it a little bit and see the development. Totally not worth the 25 right now.

developer_response.body: We are sorry you had a bad experience playing our game. We are aware of the screen glitches and FPS-related issues some people are facing, and we are working hard to have them patched as soon as possible. Moreover, thanks for taking the time to share your feedback.

reviews.review_description: The game is decent, it’s almost like actually being in the show, almost. In the first hour of playing I experienced a tons of bugs, the walking is a little wonky, and the levels are pretty bland. The first level mostly consists of opening vents, going into vents, going out of vents, then repeat. I don’t want to call this a cash grab even though like most comic vr games (Ex. Iron man, Deadpool, ect) it probably is. The game was more than likely rushed in order to get it out around the time as the last season of the show, and I think truly it just needs to be polished. Better movement, bug fixes, more details, ect. It does have its ups too, the game has a unique assortment of powers, though I wish you were able to punch people. The game also has almost every character from the main cast of the show. But again it really does need to be polished.

developer_response.body: Hi there. First of all, thanks for taking the time to send us your feedback. We worked hard to bring a game that could be a good experience for everyone who is a fan of the show and the comics, especially because we are also fans. That said, we are aware of the bugs and overall wonkiness people are facing, and we are very sorry about them. We are working on them as we speak to have them patched quickly. Thanks for your patience.

reviews.review_title: Alright, not as great as it could be.
reviews.review_description:
Can’t post the content because of its vulgarity, gameplay feels like it was meant for children (despite its age rating), story was alright but the graphics made it less interesting.

Don’t get this if you’ve played other story/combat-oriented VR games

However, it’s great for a beginning VR game. I look forward to some updates.

developer_response.body:
Hey there,
About the gameplay, even though the game is oriented to a mature audience, we aimed to get the overall gameplay simple to focus on the game’s features and narrative. It was never our intent to make a game that is hard to play.
About graphics, we don’t know if you saw it, but our last patch had several aspects of the game polished and optimized to ensure a more enjoyable overall experience.
We really hope you can give the game another go.

reviews.review_description:
Revising this real quick since I feel like I was too harsh. SO FAR it does feel buns to play.

Even if you’re a fan of “stealth VR” you’ll probably not like this.

I’m glad they got the official actors and I DO think the backstory is alright, but gameplay wise this just isn’t it for me.

developer_response.body:
Hey there, first of all, we’re glad to know you enjoyed the story of the game and the fact that we got the actors to be in it. Everyone involved in Trigger Warning really shines, bringing their characters to life.
Now, talking about gameplay, we don’t know if you saw it, but some weeks ago, we had a patch that rebalanced lots of bits of the game, which improved the overall experience of it. Maybe you should give it another try. Hope to hear back from you.

EDIT: Since your feedback, we’ve released two major updates that significantly improved both the game’s performance and visuals. We’d really recommend giving the game another try if you haven’t checked it out recently, as the experience is now much smoother overall. Hope to hear back from you!

reviews.review_description:
Really feels like you're one of them.. and sees the homelander in front of you is insane! I terrified.
Awesome game!

Started by crushing 3 times in a row, then compiled shaders, which must be the first VR title to do that. Must be ridiculous with its amount of detail and graphics.

I took off the headset when I moved away of designated area in conversation and saw a static pair of feet  that supposedly were mine, attached to the chair and covered with blanket, no body at all. 

I suppose I could compare it to Stranger things game, which in a contrast to that one managed to make somewhat interesting stuff.

developer_response.body:
Hi there, thanks for taking the time to send your feedback.
The issues you reported are indeed very odd. We released a polishment patch some weeks ago that aimed specifically at fixing weird bugs like that and improving game performance as a whole. What about you giving the game a new go now that it’s fixed in the sense? We’d love to hear back from you.

EDIT: Since your feedback, we’ve released a new update that significantly improved both the game’s performance and visuals. We’d really recommend giving the game another try if you haven’t checked it out recently, as the experience is now much smoother overall. Hope to hear back from you!

reviews.review_title: Game is good if you like the Boys.
reviews.review_description: Now let me get this stright I have not fully played the game yet so this will be updated in the late future. I have played for about 3 hours, thought the first three missions. And let me just say there are flaws, but that's to be expected with any new game. The game is fun to an extent, there is definitely that Boys level of shock, but I just came in with different expectation and that just hasn't been met yet or may not at all be me, but im still some what enjoying it. Now its a three star for me because the gameplay feels weak, we're a supe for gods sake were spouses to be powerful and even more powerful than humans. And again im only at the beginning of the game so hopefully this changes 🙏, and the actual head on combat feels dull for now, it forces me to be stealthily when in some moments I don't want to be, but that's just for now. The story seems pretty good so far. I fell pretty interested in it and feel for the main charter. But if you haven't watched the boys before hand you are kinda of confused on who the other people you are teaming up with and their backgrounds. In all, the games feels like it was well thought out for people who are fans of the series and willing to be part of it but in my opinion its been horrible executed and you can feel more like a supe in other games on vr.

developer_response.body: Thanks for taking the time to share your feedback and being so reasonable with your points. You get more powerful as the game progresses :)

reviews.review_description: Its got charm in spades but man the animation is rough; clipping and jankiness abound and can leap higher than superman in the 40s.  Its got potential to be awesome but needs a bit of work for a polished experience

developer_response.body: Thanks for taking your time to send us your feedback. Our team is currently working on a patch and we should be releasing it soon.

reviews.review_description: YOU CAN BEAT THIS GAME IN 40 MIN TO A HOUR.  FOR 35 BUCKS... IM DISAPPOINTED
There’s too many f””kin bugs. It keeps pausing, even though I’m not pressing the button and I’m not leaving my boundary. The characters are all buggy. And it’s just like hitman reloaded.

developer_response.body:
Hi there, Michael. We're sorry to hear that the performance issues got in the way of your experience. We don't really know which bugs you faced exactly, but our last patch had several bug fixes, visual polishment and adjustments to guarantee more stable FPS, not to mention lots of extra tweaks.
If you haven’t updated your game yet, we strongly recommend you do that so you can give the game another try. Hope to hear back from you!

reviews.review_description: As far as tv games go im enjoying it a lot feels like your in an episode small puzzles to figure out and the head popping is nice. I like the cartooney style in it too makes a lighthearted gorefest xD

Overhyped...I thought going in I'd get a boss fight for all those bad supes...wrong only 2 boss fights in the whole game and they are both insanely easy....the other 2 bad supes basically hand they're lives over without the player doing anything..finished the game in like no more than 5 hours..2 sessions and the game was over. You guys remember that crap batman game that let u live a day as bruce...before the good batman game came out. That's what this reminds me of. It's like a day in the life. Even tho u sleep after every mission. A missions only gunna take about 20 minutes. Idk man as a huge fan of the show I was very underwhelmed by this game. It had it's moments but not what I was expecting. It was OK. Not good not bad just ok in my opinion. And what's with my hands getting stuck to everything and freezing my body. Or hands not visible by headset so they go all over the place. Forcing me to hold my hands in front of my headset for 95% of this game. Very awkward game to play. I reach for temp v and the holsters move away from my hands making them almost impossible to grab I even adjusted holsters and it didn't help I look toward them reach for one and they move away like they don't want you to grab them. Very jank and short game. But I mean it's an ok game. Would refund if I could

developer_response.body:
Hi there, so sorry to hear your hype didn't live up to your expectations. You are clearly a big fan of the franchise, and we put a lot of effort into bringing all the TV show vibe to the game the best way possible. A shame it didn't do it for you =/

Regarding what you mentioned about your hands getting stuck everywhere, we don't know if you saw it, but some weeks ago we released a polishment patch aimed at fixing bugs like that as well as improving performance. Maybe give it another go?

In any case, thanks for your input. Hope you can replay the game in this improved way any day soon.

reviews.review_description: when i saw it on the store i directly bought it and i didn’t regret the story of the game is very good the graphics are good and i loved the gameplay and the mechanics
Really good if you like the show you'll really like this, the only bad thing i can say about this game is a little more guidance on where to go during the missions, keep getting lost.

Been playing for about an hour and a half 
and so far its lived up to expectations. Humour does hit if  you like the show and voice acting aint too bad so far.
it is fun
I love the story it going but it to hard to play and I feel like the game is a bit slow and I can't defeat the boss it like they dont follow the game and it way to difficult and made me rage

developer_response.body:
Hi there! We are glad you enjoyed the story of the game. A deep narrative design is one of the main pillars of the project, so in that sense - nailed it!
Now, regarding the issue of the difficulty curve, there's a get-used-to-it factor with every challenge the game presents. We're sure if you put your effort into it, you'll be able to beat them. Since you enjoyed the story so much, it should be worth it.
That said, we are always analysing ways to balance the game the best way possible, based on feedback like yours. We are planning to release a new rebalance patch soon.

Hope you can give it another try and get back to tell us how it went.

reviews.review_title: Not deserved hype...lemme tell you why
reviews.review_description: First off, this game has some pretty decent graphics. I mean, the voice acting is the exact same as in the show, but the physics are honestly not the best. When you're taking someone down, you can literally only do it from behind. And that's the only way you can honestly take them down. Besides throwing something at them with your telekinesis and honestly, this game is just not the best doesn't have the best physics or anything. As much as I wanted to play this game, I really wanted it to live up to the hype. But sadly, it kind of disappointed. I would not really recommend playing this game

developer_response.body:
Hey Tyson,
Sorry to hear that the hype didn't live up to your expectations. Sadly, these aspects you pointed out were game design choices that we chose to reinforce the stealthy side of the game, since that was the main element we were aiming for the gameplay to have. Regarding physics, maybe you tried the game pre-patch and left with a bad taste in your mouth. You see, we patched lots of bits of the game and gave it an overall rebalance. Maybe give it another go now that it’s more polished? We’d love to hear back from you.

EDIT: Since your feedback, we’ve released a new update that significantly improved both the game’s performance and visuals. We’d really recommend giving the game another try if you haven’t checked it out recently, as the experience is now much smoother overall. Hope to hear back from you!

reviews.review_title: I am reaching out to the developers
reviews.review_description: I wish I could write a proper review, but I can't review something that is not working.  All I get is game crashed.  I have reinstalled 3 times, and NOTHING.

developer_response.body:
We are very sorry you are facing such a game-breaking situation like this. We worked very hard on our game, but we are aware that some people are getting crashes and bugs. We are already working on getting everything patched and fixed so you guys can have a proper experience asap. Thanks for taking your time to send us your feedback.

EDIT: Since your feedback, we’ve released two major updates that significantly improved both the game’s performance and visuals. We’d really recommend giving the game another try if you haven’t checked it out recently, as the experience is now much smoother overall. Hope to hear back from you!

reviews.review_description:
It's great good power use ok graphics but it would be better if you could hold weapons and normally stab enemies and the end boss fight rlly hurts my neck
￼
Very good game
Very good love the powers love the boys just everything I would ever want and more lots of playability very good
It’s Dishonored, but on steroids. What more can you ask?
You should be able to play as Homelander or one of the sevens. The story is not good and the graphics are cheeks

developer_response.body:
Hey there, it’s a bummer to know our game didn’t meet your expectations, especially because you’re clearly a fan of the franchise. We worked alongside the TV series writer’s room to keep the overall tone of the game the same as the show; it’s really a shame it didn’t work for you. Graphic-wise, we had a patch that polished a lot of stuff in-game, so if this was a big let-down to you, maybe you should give the game another go, just in case.
And no, you still can’t play as Homelander, but facing him is an awesome part of the game, trust us.
